description: The 'Enterprise Software Development Project' is falling behind schedule. To catch up, implement a 6-day work week by making Saturday a working day in the 'Standard' base calendar. Set Saturday's working hours to 08:00-12:00 and 13:00-17:00, ensuring Sunday remains a non-working day. Save the project as an MSPDI XML file to /home/ga/Projects/crunch_schedule.xml.
